description_long: This hammer features a robust, cylindrical head with a slightly tapered striking face, constructed from a dark, metallic material. The head is solid and blocky, lacking any visible claws or peens, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty striking rather than pulling nails. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of a sturdy, possibly metal or composite material, seamlessly integrated into the head. The finish is matte black, giving the tool a modern, industrial appearance. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The hammer appears new and undamaged, with no visible signs of wear or accessories attached.
description: A matte black, heavy-duty hammer with a cylindrical, solid head and a long, straight handle, designed for striking tasks. The tool is unmarked and shows no signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical head with a flat rear and a slightly tapered striking face, and the straight handle extending upward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow, polygonal face of the hammer head and the handle centered above it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same cylindrical head and straight handle visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat back of the hammer head and the handle aligned above it.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, rectangular-section handle made of composite or metal, smooth and untextured, with a matte black finish.
attribute_head_type: Solid, cylindrical sledge-type head with a flat rear and a slightly tapered striking face, no claws or peens.
